title: Osteophyte (bone spur) - NHS
text:
eophytes are closely linked to arthritis, the treatments you might need are the same as treatments for arthritis.
Treatment may include:
painkillers such as paracetamol and ibuprofen physiotherapy losing weight if you're overweight surgery, such as a hip replacement or knee replacement 
Page last reviewed: 22 December 2022
Next review due: 22 December 2025
